name: Payments / Fintech
description: Payment processors, card merchant platforms, fintechs handling cardholder data or financial transactions. PCI DSS is the primary driver.

conditional_frameworks.SOX: If publicly traded or preparing for IPO
conditional_frameworks.GLBA: If offering financial products to consumers

priority_control_families: Access control to cardholder data environment
Vulnerability management (quarterly scans, annual pen test)
required_artifacts: Network diagram showing CDE scope and segmentation
Key management procedures and custody records
Service provider inventory and compliance status
Change management tickets for CDE changes
typical_gaps: CDE scope not formally defined or documented
Default credentials not changed on network devices
Service provider PCI compliance not tracked
Code review not part of SSDLC
Quarterly scan remediation not tracked to closure

document_patterns.policy_header: includes PCI DSS version reference and CDE scope statement
document_patterns.policy_statement: references cardholder data protection and CDE boundary
document_patterns.enforcement: references potential card brand fines and assessment consequences
document_patterns.references: always cites PCI DSS requirements by number (e.g., Requirement 7.1)
